label: Year 2,000 HE: Agricultural Revolution
description: Humanity's impact begins as we start modifying the environment to grow food.

label: Year 5,000 HE: Rise of Cities
description: Humans begin to cluster into the first urban settlements, creating concentrated environmental impacts.

label: Year 11,760 HE: Industrial Revolution
description: The steam engine and fossil fuels mark the true beginning of massive human impact on Earth's atmosphere.

label: Year 11,950 HE: The Great Acceleration
description: A sharp increase in human activity and population leads to rapid changes in Earth's chemistry and biology.

label: Year 11,945 HE: The Atomic Age
description: Nuclear testing leaves a permanent radioactive marker in the global geological record.

label: Year 12,026 HE: The Anthropocene Today
description: Humans are now the primary driver of environmental change. Our activities redefine the planet's future.

label: Year 12,050 HE: Climate Tipping Points?
description: Potential future where critical climate boundaries are reached unless major changes are made.

label: Year 12,100 HE: Sustainable Future?
description: A possible transition to a circular, carbon-neutral global society.

label: Year 20,000 HE: The Far Future
description: What will the world look like in 10,000 years? Humanity's long-term legacy on Earth and beyond.
